notes: Extended cases for iterative pre-order traversal of a binary search tree.

cases.name: sample_preorder_iterative
expect_contains_all: The resulting pre-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 20 15 10 18 50 25 80

cases.name: right_skewed_tree_preorder
expect_contains_all: The resulting pre-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 20 30 40

cases.name: duplicates_are_ignored_in_preorder
expect_contains_all: The resulting pre-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 20 10 30 25
